title: Running and Debugging - How Do I?
description:
Running and Debugging - How Do I?

Running and Debugging - How Do I...?

How do I run my application?

To run your application from the Epson RC+ 8.0 development environment, you can use the Run Window or the Operator Window.

To run programs from the Run Window, press F5 or select Run Window from the Run menu.

To run programs from the Operator Window, press Shift+F5 or select Operator Window from the Run menu.

How do I debug my application?

There are several tools in Epson RC+ 8.0 to aid you in debugging your application.

	Breakpoints.
	  You can set breakpoints in your source code to halt execution
	 of a task so you can examine variable values and other task status.
	  See Toggle Breakpoint
	Step and
	 Walk.  After a task has been halted from the Task Manager
	 or reaches a breakpoint, you can execute Step
	 Into, Step Over, or Walk
	 from the Run menu.
	Task Manager.
	  Open the Task Manager from
	 the Tools menu to view task status.  You can see the current
	 program, function, and line number for a task.
	Variable
	 Display.  Select Display
	 Variables from the Run menu to view variable values.
	I/O Monitor.
	  Open the I/O Monitor from
	 the Tools menu to view Input, Output, and Memory I/O status.  You
	 can configure up to three custom views.
	Command
	 Window.  Open the Command
	 Window from the Tools menu to execute commands while tasks are
	 running.
